objective: Optimize Blueprint-WebApp's autonomous org and operating budget for a $500/month all-in launch/growth budget by auditing current repo/runtime truth, then implementing a repo-local, proof-bearing budget-and-cadence control plan with no live side effects.

current_state_evidence.git_status: dirty tree remains broad; budget work touched only Paperclip config, control-room map, budget doc, and budget output artifacts

cost_cache_current.blocker: Firestore is not configured; pass --from-json to report on exported runs.

checked: summary asserts no live mutation attempted

dynamic_allocation_loop.boundary: The loop can recommend a repo-local budget diff only from fresh allocation-grade proof, and every spend-affecting move requires human approval before any live-system owner acts.

repo_spend_control_surfaces.conclusion: Repo has a deterministic/manual spend-control surface, but this run did not treat it as live billing proof or issue any spend request.

requirement_audit.requirement: Snapshot current repo state and preserve unrelated dirty/untracked work.
requirement_audit.evidence: git status --short shows a broad dirty tree; budget edits stayed in ops/paperclip/blueprint-company/.paperclip.yaml, ops/paperclip/control-room-map.md, docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md, and output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/.

requirement_audit.requirement: Recompute local truth with control-room inventory.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run paperclip:control-room:inventory reports $173 declared agent budget, 26 active routines, 36 paused routines, and 0 true missing desired skills.

requirement_audit.requirement: Recompute local truth with agent cost/cache report.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run agent:cost-cache-report ran and reported fixture-backed cost/cache data; Firestore was not configured, so live spend remains unverified.
npm run autoagent:recursive-improve -- --dry-run completed as no_change_report_only with no canary, no rollback, and no live mutation.

requirement_audit.requirement: Build a budget ledger with current, target, variance, owner system, proof source, and proof level.
Classify routines and agents into P0 keep, P1 reduce cadence, and P2 pause/event-trigger.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md includes P0/P1/P2 classification; .paperclip.yaml implements the cadence compression.

requirement_audit.requirement: Produce a model ladder: deterministic scripts, DeepSeek V4 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, Codex.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/architecture/autonomous-org-500-month-operating-budget-2026-06-01.md includes the model ladder and authority boundaries.

requirement_audit.requirement: Implement only safe local repo changes with no live side effects.
requirement_audit.evidence: Only repo files and local output artifacts were edited; no live send, Notion write, Stripe/payment/payout, Render/Firebase production mutation, provider job, rights/privacy/legal claim, hosted-session fulfillment claim, city activation claim, customer/traction claim, or Operational Launch Ready claim was made.

requirement_audit.requirement: Bring declared active monthly agent envelope under the target sub-budget.
requirement_audit.evidence: .paperclip.yaml now declares $173/month across all agents, below the $175 Paperclip sub-budget used by the $500 all-in plan.
File exists with budget ledger, compression plan, routine classification, model ladder, next goal queue, and closeout state.
File exists, parses as valid JSON, and matches .paperclip.yaml for Paperclip budget and routine counts.

requirement_audit.requirement: Produce a ranked queue of the next 5 /goal commands.
requirement_audit.evidence: The ranked queue is present in both the architecture doc and summary.json.

requirement_audit.requirement: Add a dynamic allocator that can decide whether to recommend moving budget based on what is working, without autonomously spending.
requirement_audit.evidence: config/autonomy/budget-allocation-policy.yaml, config/autonomy/outcome-sources.yaml, scripts/autonomy/collect-outcome-snapshot.ts, scripts/autonomy/recommend-budget-reallocation.ts, scripts/autonomy/dynamic-budget-allocator-core.ts, and scripts/autonomy/verify-dynamic-budget-allocator.ts implement observe -> outcome snapshot -> score -> recommend -> human approval packet -> proposed repo-local diff. npm run autonomy:budget:dynamic:verify passed, and the current recommendation is no_reallocation_improve_proof_first because current proof does not clear allocation thresholds.
The architecture doc, completion audit JSON, and closeout markdown include objective, proof paths, command outputs, requirement coverage, next action, retry/resume condition, and residual risk.

requirement_audit.requirement: Verify current billing locally or stop when it cannot be verified locally.
requirement_audit.evidence: OpenAI API Costs are live-verified at $0.00 in output/autonomous-org/budget/spend-snapshots/keychain-live-read-2026-06-01/latest.json. Other provider billing exports were not supplied or are usage/credit/account proof only, so live billing remains incomplete overall.

requirement_audit.requirement: Provide a repeatable local verifier for the repo-local budget/cadence packet.
requirement_audit.evidence: npm run autonomy:budget:verify passed and wrote output/autonomous-org/budget/latest/verification.json plus verification.md.

requirement_audit.requirement: Inspect repo-native spend-control surfaces before proposing city/ad spend.
requirement_audit.evidence: docs/agentic-spend-control-plane-2026-04-30.md, blueprint-request-spend helpers, agentSpendPolicy, agentSpendProviders, and agentSpendLedger were inspected. They provide deterministic/manual spend request control, but not current vendor billing proof.

live_proof_gaps: DeepSeek direct usage export and OpenRouter billing if used
Analytics billing and KPI owner-system proof
Recipient evidence enrichment receipts or provider exports
Ad account spend and paused-draft proof
Live Paperclip routine execution after repo config propagation
resume_condition: Attach current billing exports or dashboard proof for the live proof gaps, excluding the Codex OAuth/Pro subscription seat from the $500 launch/growth envelope, then rerun the local budget reconciliation without live mutation.
